candidates.why: Semantically matches current assets, but appears sparsely populated and may not be the main reported total line.
Swedish label for total current assets; clean reported total and better than a balancing/value placeholder.

candidates.row_label: Prepaid Expenses and Other Current Assets - Balancing value
candidates.why: Not total current assets; only a balancing/value line for one component.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit Swedish total current assets line instead of the sparse English 'Current assets' row.

candidates.why: Standard Swedish label for cash and cash equivalents on the balance sheet; matches ending cash values in cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow ending cash line, useful cross-check but target prefers balance sheet cash.

variables.notes: Selected balance-sheet cash label as requested; it reconciles to the cash-flow ending cash line.

candidates.why: Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not a clean reported total.
Swedish label for total current liabilities; clean reported total.
Cash flow movement line, not the balance sheet stock variable needed.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Explicit current portion of long-term debt; fits STD definition well when available.
Clean total current interest-bearing debt line; likely best short-term debt measure and separate from lease liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt including Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Includes leases, which should be excluded in baseline STD.

variables.notes: Preferred the clean total current interest-bearing debt line. Did not add 'Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year' to avoid possible double counting. Excluded lease-related row by rule.

candidates.why: Swedish label for tax liabilities/taxes payable; best match for current taxes payable.
Deferred tax liability, not taxes payable/current tax liability.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed, but this is a confident exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Explicit net total PPE line; preferred total/net PPE measure.
Only a component and gross amount, not preferred total PPE.
Component-level Swedish line, not the best total PPE measure.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate existed, but this is the clearest total net PPE label.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities
candidates.why: Despite concatenated wording, the values and position indicate this is the net cash flow from operating activities line.

candidates.row_label: Tax paid Cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Only tax paid component within operating cash flow, not total OANCF.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities

variables.notes: Selected the reported operating cash flow total; the label appears concatenated with the next section header but clearly represents CFO.
